character.definition: (a corrupted form) distress; very difficulty; anxiety; very tired
a kind of jade, (non-classical form of 玭) pearls
the solitary wasp, lice on cattle, a kind of gad-fly
to see; to observe or examine
(same as 䰭) dreary cries of ghosts; sound of monsters

variants.raw_value: 蒙	蒙 矇 濛 懞

character.definition: to tangle, knot, kink, get twisted; to get complicated
